query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('skills','task_skill_selections','wizard_sessions') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND ((TABLE_NAME = 'build_targets' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('governanceFilesJson','governanceBudgetEnforced')) OR (TABLE_NAME = 'wizard_sessions' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('ownerUserId','repoUrl','commitSha','status','recommendationJson','repoContextJson','errorMessage','expiresAt','createdAt','updatedAt'))) ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aAiEZGvt2NNVee.ae03d21acc17 --database 5KVWo4UoTpTyEXqmynzSfU --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('skills','task_skill_selections','wizard_sessions') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND ((TABLE_NAME = 'build_targets' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('governanceFilesJson','governanceBudgetEnforced')) OR (TABLE_NAME = 'wizard_sessions' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('ownerUserId','repoUrl','commitSha','status','recommendationJson','repoContextJson','errorMessage','expiresAt','createdAt','updatedAt'))) ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION;

build_targets	governanceFilesJson
